##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Downs and Hexiong Yang
##DESCRIPTION=Brown transparent closed pyramids, like flattened octahedra, associated with vanadinite

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
